purpose: CapEx benchmark database. Each entry references PUBLIC source (annual report, NI 43-101, JORC, SEC filing, press release). Used in DD §7.3 to triangulate stated CapEx against sector reality.
usage: Filter by sector × asset_type × scale × year × jurisdiction. Get range. Compare target asset to range. Anything outside ±20% of range deserves §7.4 hidden CapEx investigation.
data_quality_notes: Public CapEx figures often blur scope (does it include power infra? captive port? housing?). Always read footnotes.
Inflation: 2015 vs 2020 vs 2024 USD are not comparable without escalation. CCI (Chemical CapEx Index) or sector-specific deflators apply.
Currency: convert to USD at time-of-decision FX, not at time-of-report FX, for emerging markets.
Single-asset extremes (Norilsk SO2 program, EGA Hot Metal expansion) skew aggregate ranges. Use median, not mean.
Always cross-check against operational outcome — projects with reported low CapEx that overran can still be useful as 'as-built' benchmarks.

greenfield_primary.notes: Power infrastructure dominates variance. Hydro greenfield carries dam/turbine CapEx. Modern Middle Eastern gas-fired (EGA Al Taweelah, Sohar) sit in 4500-5500 range. Indian/Chinese coal-fired greenfields are 3500-4500 but exclude SO2 capture and ash handling typically.

representative_data_points.notes: Includes 1450 MW combined-cycle plant — anomalously high $/t because power CapEx loaded
Higher $/t due to greenfield Oman infrastructure

brownfield_expansion_no_power.unit: USD per tonne incremental annual capacity
brownfield_expansion_no_power.notes: Excludes new power infrastructure. Includes potline, casthouse, anode plant proportionate expansion.

potline_modernization_no_new_pots.unit: USD per tonne annual capacity capacity-gain
potline_modernization_no_new_pots.notes: Capacity gains 10-25% from current-density increase via busbar magnetic compensation, ACD optimisation, point-feeder retrofit.

pot_relining.notes: Includes cathode block, refractory, busbar maintenance. Excludes pot-line idle time opportunity cost.

anode_plant.unit: USD per tonne annual green anode capacity
anode_plant.notes: Green anode plant includes mixing, pressing, baking, cooling, anode rodding.

casthouse_vdc_billet.notes: Includes melting/holding furnace, degassing, CFF filter, VDC casting machine, sawing, packaging.

casthouse_slab_vdc.notes: Slab casters carry higher unit cost due to larger cross-section and rolling-grade quality requirements.

casthouse_sow_or_t_bar.notes: Simplest commodity output. Reference for understanding minimum casthouse CapEx.

spent_potlining_treatment_plant.unit: USD per tonne annual SPL treatment capacity
spent_potlining_treatment_plant.notes: Treatment routes vary. Some jurisdictions still permit cement co-processing without dedicated treatment plant.

greenfield_with_mine.unit: USD per tonne annual Cu in concentrate
greenfield_with_mine.notes: Wide range driven by ore grade, strip ratio, geographic remoteness, infrastructure. Latin American greenfields lower end; African higher end.

representative_data_points.scope: estimated 480 kt Cu/y at steady state
representative_data_points.notes: Underground complexity; excludes earlier open-pit infrastructure

concentrator_only_brownfield_expansion.unit: USD per tonne annual Cu in concentrate
concentrator_only_brownfield_expansion.notes: Excludes mine fleet, infrastructure. Mill expansion or new flotation circuit.

tailings_storage_facility.notes: Post-Brumadinho governance and GISTM compliance push costs upward. Closure liability separate.

sulphide_concentrator_brownfield.unit: USD per tonne annual Ni in concentrate
sulphide_concentrator_brownfield.notes: Ni concentration in mineralisation is typically 0.5-2% vs Cu 0.5-1.5%, so per-tonne-Ni CapEx scales higher.

laterite_hpal_greenfield.unit: USD per tonne annual Ni in MHP/MSP
laterite_hpal_greenfield.notes: HPAL projects are notorious for CapEx overruns. Indonesian wave (2020s) ostensibly cheaper but quality concerns. Pre-2020 global HPAL projects typically came in 1.5-2x feasibility CapEx.

nickel_refinery_to_class_one.unit: USD per tonne annual Ni cathode/sulphate
nickel_refinery_to_class_one.notes: Matte to cathode or sulphate refining. Norilsk legacy assets are lower in implied CapEx due to historical sunk cost.

so2_capture_retrofit.unit: USD per tonne annual S captured
so2_capture_retrofit.notes: Major CapEx for Norilsk and other legacy non-ferrous smelters with high uncaptured SO2. Includes acid plant typically.

cil_greenfield_with_mine_and_infrastruct.notes: Refractory ore requires BIOX, POX, or ultra-fine grind. Adds dramatically to CapEx.

tailings_retreatment_plant.unit: USD per ounce annual production from retreatment
tailings_retreatment_plant.notes: Lower CapEx than greenfield mine + plant because no mining infrastructure. But lower recovery (Anton's UMMC experience: 35-55% on aged tailings) shifts unit economics.

heap_leach_pad_construction.unit: USD per tonne ore on pad
heap_leach_pad_construction.notes: Liner type, leach pad geometry, climate, regulator-imposed monitoring all drive cost.

cyanide_detox_retrofit.unit: USD per cubic meter daily throughput
cyanide_detox_retrofit.notes: Older sites without detox face mandatory retrofit. International Cyanide Management Code compliance drives requirements.

greenfield_bayer.unit: USD per tonne annual alumina capacity
greenfield_bayer.notes: Major variables: bauxite quality (digestion intensity), location infrastructure, energy source. Atlantic/CIS lower; Western Australia mid-range; African higher due to greenfield infrastructure.

brownfield_expansion.unit: USD per tonne annual alumina capacity

greenfield.unit: USD per tonne annual ferrochrome capacity
greenfield.notes: Submerged arc furnace + sintering + briquetting + treatment. South African historic vs Kazakh modern divergent.

contingency_norms.notes: Contingency is meant for known unknowns. Vendor decks often show contingency below norm to make project pass IRR threshold — investigate.

escalation_indices.chemical_engineering_capex_index_ceci_av: 3-4 in normal years; 8-15 in 2021-2023 inflation spike
escalation_indices.use_for: Translating older feasibility CapEx forward to current decision year.

anton_direct_benchmarks_curated.purpose: Anton's direct-experience CapEx data points. Triangulate against public benchmarks. Citable under NDA only.
